title: Card archetype payload (shared defs)
description: Shared $defs for the per-archetype card payload structure. Referenced by today.schema.json and (optionally) per-story entries in index.schema.json. Each archetype carries the same envelope (eyebrow / headline / kicker / content / byline) but the `content` shape differs by `kind`. The renderer in web/app.js dispatches on `kind`.

eyebrow.description: Short label above the headline (e.g. 'PARADOX' or 'WHAT MOVED').

kicker.description: Factual event anchor (1-2 sentences, no framing language). Mirrors analysis.event_summary.

content.description: Archetype-specific payload. Shape varies by kind; renderer dispatches.

see_how_path.description: Relative URL to the full analysis.
